thank_you.title: Request Received!
thank_you.message: Thank you for your interest. A Dubai-based concierge specialist will contact you within 2 hours via WhatsApp or email.
thank_you.step1: Concierge Review - We'll review your preferences and check availability
thank_you.step2: Personal Contact - Expect a call or WhatsApp message within 2 hours
thank_you.step3: Tailored Proposal - Receive a customized package with pricing
thank_you.step4: Secure Booking - Finalize details and receive credentials
